query_normalized: multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and image computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on remote sensing image-text alignment and vision-language foundation models, which is an off-domain application compared to the user's specific question about "multimodal tabular learning" involving structured tabular data combined with text and images. While both involve multimodal learning, the core data modality (tabular vs. remote sensing imagery) and the specific learning mechanisms differ significantly, failing to meet the criteria for same-mechanism evidence or independ
